response.original_title: The Carolina Covenant: Then, Now and Forever
response.overview: Providing access to an affordable college education is at the heart of Carolina’s mission. As UNC-Chapel Hill marks the 20th anniversary of the Carolina Covenant, we celebrate this groundbreaking program that empowers exceptional students to graduate debt-free. Join us as we hear from the program’s founders; supporters like Roy Williams; and a few of the scholars, alumni, and communities whose lives have been transformed by this lasting commitment to opportunity.
response.title: The Carolina Covenant: Then, Now and Forever
